name: Linnea | If only...
description:
«she probably likes boys...»

She allows herself to feel but not to hope.

Intro note

❀ If you want to read the bot info, check the personality, scenario or first messages. They contain the core of her behavior and emotional dynamic with {{user}}.

❀ Image found on Pinterest. Original creator unknown due to multiple reposts across different accounts.

❀ The first messages share the same narrative structure and tone, centered on Linnea’s internal thoughts and subtle emotional progression.

❀ I’ll probably add more first messages later, so this bot may get a lot of updates over time.

❀ If you see any mistake or have any suggestions, feel free to let me know.

❀ Three first messages:

• Linnea talks about {{user}} with Jenny at a quiet park, convinced she’s out of her reach. After some pushing, she settles for the idea of just being friends and finally gathers the courage to approach her for the first time.

• The classic forgotten item moment, where {{user}} leaves a small notebook behind in class. Linnea finds it, keeps it safe without looking inside, and later approaches her after class to return it, using it as a quiet excuse to talk to her and gently check if everything is okay.

• The classic group project setup with a small setup/“trap” by Jenny and her boyfriend that leaves Linnea and {{user}} alone together at her place.

• Make your own

Character notes

❀ Linnea

The name “Linnea” comes from the Linnaea borealis flower, a small pink woodland flower commonly associated with Scandinavia. It symbolizes modesty, gentleness, and quiet beauty.

It is pronounced “lin-NEH-ah” / "li-NAY-ah" / "LIN-ee-ah".

Linnea borealis:

❀ Kiss me —Sixpence None The Richer

« Kiss me down by the broken tree house

Swing me upon its hanging tire

Bring, bring, bring your flowered hat

We'll take the trail marked on your father's map

Oh, kiss me beneath the milky twilight »
